creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #11)

> … reinstalling devel/gobject-introspection may be required as well …

Reinstalled at 21:16 yesterday (Sunday 2022-06-05) in response to: 

pkg -r /tmp/up upgrade --force

<https://github.com/freebsd/pkg/issues/2045#issuecomment-1147055408> includes a log file. 

(freebsd/pkg issue 2045 spun off from 1659.)
